ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Time of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "airline_operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline or operator of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "replay_link" TEXT /* Link to flight replay (if available) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight departs/arrives */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal where the flight departs/arrives */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim number for arriving flights */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flight cancellation (if applicable) */,
  "is_code_share" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight is a code-share flight */,
  "code_share_partner" TEXT /* Name of the code-share partner airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES flight_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_operator_id") REFERENCES airlines_operators ("airline_operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the destination */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code of the destination */,
  "airport_iata" TEXT /* IATA code of the destination airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the destination airport */,
  "terminal_info" TEXT /* Information about the terminals at the destination airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "total_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft */,
  "cruise_speed" INTEGER /* Cruise speed of the aircraft */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines_operators" (
  "airline_operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline or operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airline or operator */,
  "operating_company" TEXT /* Operating company (if different from the airline) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of operation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline or operator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline or operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline operator */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the airline operator's logo */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline operator was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the fleet */,
  "alliance" TEXT /* Airline alliance (e.g., Star Alliance, OneWorld) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "status_change" TEXT /* Change in flight status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., status change, maintenance, security) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the issue has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being scheduled */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the flight */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight is part of a recurring schedule */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the recurring schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "recurrence_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the recurring schedule */,
  "is_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight is a charter flight */,
  "charter_company" TEXT /* Name of the charter company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
